_note: Dataset compiled from Homicide Hunter (ID Network, 2011-2020) episode records and Colorado Springs historical crime data. Locations are approximate for visualization. Some victim surnames are partial or withheld per privacy conventions on the show.

cases.title: The Long Ride Home
cases.description: After Lourdes Riddle is found strangled to death in the trunk of her car, Kenda follows the trail through military and cultural secrets.

cases.title: Evil Eyes
cases.description: July 3, 1986: A security guard finds a woman covered in blood next to a dead man at a vacant office park on the east side. Kenda discovers a bizarre murder weapon — a human eye.

cases.title: The Last Stand
cases.description: Firefighters find Victor Woods stabbed to death in his burning apartment. Kenda tracks Colorado's most notorious serial killer, Robert Browne.

cases.title: Dying Breath
cases.description: March 1987: The body of Darlene Krashoc is found behind a restaurant. A cold case finally solved in 2021 through DNA linking to Scott Kimball.

cases.title: A Question of Guilt
cases.description: Mother of three Dianne Hood is shot to death by a masked gunman on her way home from a Lupus support meeting. Kenda uncovers a sordid web of lust and greed.

cases.title: Dead End Road
cases.description: Teen runaway Maggie Fetty is found strangled to death on a mountain road. An anonymous tipster blames her best friend, but she accuses a mental patient.

cases.title: Death at the Mall
cases.description: Five people are murdered in a cold-blooded robbery at a shopping center. Much of the evidence is lost in a subsequent fire.

cases.title: Dead Man Falling
cases.description: A family of four is brutally murdered, sending shockwaves through Colorado Springs. Police initially suspect a spree killer until Kenda finds a gruesome personal connection.

cases.title: Merry Christmas
cases.description: Carefree restaurant worker Donald Ott is found shot to death on Christmas Day. Friends say he had no enemies — Kenda discovers a relative with a long criminal past.

cases.title: No Conscience
cases.description: Soft-spoken restaurant worker Sharon Coleman is murdered in a hail of large caliber gunfire. With scant physical evidence, Kenda must break through a web of lies.

cases.title: Lethal Secrets
cases.location_name: Local Grocery Store — Old Colorado City
cases.description: The elderly owners of a beloved local grocery are brutally attacked and left for dead. Working with a vague description, Kenda leads a state-wide manhunt.

cases.title: The Road Less Traveled
cases.location_name: Remote mountain road — Teller County line
cases.description: Two hunters discover a blood-drenched car on a remote mountain road, its owner riddled with buckshot. Kenda follows a stolen car trail into a dark path of deception and revenge.

cases.title: Hit and Run
cases.description: Mother of two Shaundra Murr is run over in front of her own house. Officers initially suspect a hit and run, but Kenda's instincts tell him otherwise.

cases.title: My First Case
cases.description: Kenda's very first homicide case as a rookie detective — a double shooting deemed unsolvable by veterans. Kenda solves it, earning his place in homicide.

cases.title: Moment of Impact
cases.description: When Pamela Edwards is found shot through the heart, Kenda must shield her young daughters from the horrendous scene before finding the killer.

cases.title: Barrio Heat
cases.description: Uninvited guests crash a barrio birthday party; violence erupts, leaving Enrique Urrutia dead and potentially sparking a gang war.

cases.title: Barrio Heat
cases.description: Neighbors are stunned when close friends Louis Matos and Colleen Johnson are gunned down in cold blood. Kenda locates a panic-stricken eyewitness.

cases.title: Fallen Soldier
cases.description: The death of an Iraq War veteran is investigated. What appears to be a straightforward case reveals layers of military culture, loyalty, and betrayal.

cases.title: Naked in the Park
cases.description: A young woman is found naked and strangled in a park not 200 yards from her home. Kenda rethinks the entire case when he realizes someone close has been lying.

cases.title: Cold as Ice
cases.description: The naked body of a young mother is found frozen in a deserted cemetery. The case runs cold for years until Kenda reopens it — solved in 2021 via DNA.

cases.title: Line of Duty
cases.description: Sgt. Kenda learns his friend and fellow officer Mark Dabling has been killed in the line of duty. Police conduct an all-out manhunt for a gunman more dangerous than expected.

cases.title: Strip Club Secrets
cases.description: A father is shot in the head just steps from a strip club. Kenda traces the victim's last hours and the field of suspects grows, but no one will talk.

cases.title: Blood Brothers
cases.description: After church, deacon Robert Walton is beaten to death in a public park. Kenda discovers the religious leader had a shocking dark side.

cases.title: False Suicide
cases.description: When police find Patrick Ray with a gunshot to the temple, the scene appears to be a suicide. But Kenda's instinct says otherwise, and digging deeper reveals a shocking murder mystery.

cases.title: Anderson Family Massacre
cases.description: August 1989: Kenda is called to a triple homicide inside a mobile home. Cynthia Anderson, her husband Scott, and their 5-year-old son Scottie are all found shot to death.

cases.title: A Woman in the Mountains
cases.description: A woman is found in the mountains, naked and covered in blood. Kenda uncovers a world of violence and sexual fetishes, culminating in the most intense interrogation of his career.

cases.title: The Last Case
cases.description: Dec 2, 1995: William Halstead calls his friend in a panic — his girlfriend Mary Ann Moebus won't wake up. Kenda finds bloody drag marks and a blood-soaked bed. The last major case before his retirement.
